subject: [PATCH] mm/memcontrol: restore irq wrapper for lruvec_stat_mod_folio()

reviews.author: Shakeel Butt
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the safety of lruvec_stat_mod_folio() against IRQs and questioned the validity of the syzbot link provided by the patch author.

reviews.author: Vlastimil Babka (SUSE)
reviews.summary: Dismissed the patch as a product of LLM and suggested ignoring it.

reviews.author: create0818@163.com
reviews.summary: Retracted their earlier conclusion that the patch was necessary to fix a regression, citing new evidence from QEMU validation.

2026-04-13.patch_summary: A patch to restore an IRQ wrapper for lruvec_stat_mod_folio() was submitted, but concerns were raised about its safety and the validity of the evidence provided.
